property.name: java.library.path
property.value: C:\Program Files\Java\jdk-11\bin;C:\WINDOWS\Sun\Java\bin;C:\WINDOWS\system32;C:\WINDOWS;"C:\Program Files\Common Files\Oracle\Java\javapath;C:\Program Files\Java\jdk-18.0.2.1\bin";C:\WINDOWS\system32;C:\WINDOWS;C:\WINDOWS\System32\Wbem;C:\WINDOWS\System32\WindowsPowerShell\v1.0\;C:\WINDOWS\System32\OpenSSH\;C:\Program Files\Microsoft SQL Server\Client SDK\ODBC\130\Tools\Binn\;C:\Program Files\Microsoft SQL Server\Client SDK\ODBC\170\Tools\Binn\;C:\Program Files (x86)\Microsoft SQL Server\150\Tools\Binn\;C:\Program Files\Microsoft SQL Server\150\Tools\Binn\;C:\Program Files\Microsoft SQL Server\150\DTS\Binn\;C:\Program Files\Java\jdk-14.0.1\bin;C:\Anaconda3\Scripts;C:\Windows\System32\Wbem;C:\Windows\System32\Wbem;C:\Program Files\nodejs\;C:\Program Files\Java\jdk-11\bin;C:\Users\murat\AppData\Local\Android\Sdk\platform-tools;C:\Users\murat\AppData\Local\Android\Sdk\cmdline-tools;C:\Program Files (x86)\NVIDIA Corporation\PhysX\Common;C:\Program Files\dotnet\;C:\Maven\apache-maven-3.9.14\bin;C:\Program Files\Java\jdk-18.0.2.1\bin;C:\Users\murat\AppData\Roaming\npm;C:\Users\murat\.dotnet\tools;.

testcase.name: runScenario["Successfully adding a new employee and completing the profile", "US-02: Add Employee"](1)
testcase.system-out: @Web @AddEmployee @Positive Scenario: Successfully adding a new employee and completing the profile &amp#27;[90m# src/test/resources/features/web/AddEmployee.feature:10&amp#27;[0m &amp#27;[32mGiven &amp#27;[0m&amp#27;[32mUser is already logged in as Admin&amp#27;[0m &amp#27;[90m# com.casestudy.stepdefinitions.LoginSteps.user_is_already_logged_in_as_admin()&amp#27;[0m &amp#27;[32mAnd &amp#27;[0m&amp#27;[32mUser is on the Dashboard page&amp#27;[0m &amp#27;[90m# com.casestudy.stepdefinitions.LoginSteps.user_is_on_the_dashboard_page()&amp#27;[0m &amp#27;[32mWhen &amp#27;[0m&amp#27;[32mUser navigates to the PIM module&amp#27;[0m &amp#27;[90m# com.casestudy.stepdefinitions.PIMSteps.user_navigates_to_the_pim_module()&amp#27;[0m &amp#27;[32mAnd &amp#27;[0m&amp#27;[32mClicks on the Add Employee button&amp#27;[0m &amp#27;[90m# com.casestudy.stepdefinitions.PIMSteps.clicks_on_the_add_employee_button()&amp#27;[0m &amp#27;[32mAnd &amp#27;[0m&amp#27;[32mEnters First Name &amp#27;[0m&amp#27;[32m&amp#27;[1m"QA"&amp#27;[0m&amp#27;[32m and Last Name &amp#27;[0m&amp#27;[32m&amp#27;[1m"Automation"&amp#27;[0m &amp#27;[90m# com.casestudy.stepdefinitions.PIMSteps.enters_first_name_and_last_name(java.lang.String,java.lang.String)&amp#27;[0m &amp#27;[32mAnd &amp#27;[0m&amp#27;[32mClicks on the Save employee button&amp#27;[0m &amp#27;[90m# com.casestudy.stepdefinitions.PIMSteps.clicks_on_the_save_employee_button()&amp#27;[0m &amp#27;[32mThen &amp#27;[0m&amp#27;[32mThe Employee Profile screen should be opened&amp#27;[0m &amp#27;[90m# com.casestudy.stepdefinitions.PIMSteps.the_employee_profile_screen_should_be_opened()&amp#27;[0m &amp#27;[32mWhen &amp#27;[0m&amp#27;[32mUser fills in additional profile details like Nationality and Marital Status&amp#27;[0m &amp#27;[90m# com.casestudy.stepdefinitions.PIMSteps.user_fills_in_additional_profile_details()&amp#27;[0m &amp#27;[32mAnd &amp#27;[0m&amp#27;[32mClicks on the Save button in the Personal Details section&amp#27;[0m &amp#27;[90m# com.casestudy.stepdefinitions.PIMSteps.clicks_on_the_save_button_in_the_personal_details_section()&amp#27;[0m &amp#27;[32mThen &amp#27;[0m&amp#27;[32mThe employee registration should be successfully completed&amp#27;[0m &amp#27;[90m# com.casestudy.stepdefinitions.PIMSteps.the_employee_registration_should_be_successfully_completed()&amp#27;[0m

SLF4J(W): Defaulting to no-operation (NOP) logger implementation SLF4J(W): See https://www.slf4j.org/codes.html#noProviders for further details. You may need to include a dependency on a specific version of the CDP using something similar to `org.seleniumhq.selenium:selenium-devtools-v86:4.18.1` where the version ("v86") matches the version of the chromium-based browser you're using and the version number of the artifact is the same as Selenium's.

testcase.name: runScenario["Search for an employee by name and verify the result table", "US-03: Employee Search (PIM)"](2)
testcase.system-out: @Web @EmployeeSearch @Positive Scenario: Search for an employee by name and verify the result table &amp#27;[90m# src/test/resources/features/web/EmployeeSearch.feature:11&amp#27;[0m &amp#27;[32mGiven &amp#27;[0m&amp#27;[32mUser is already logged in as Admin&amp#27;[0m &amp#27;[90m# com.casestudy.stepdefinitions.LoginSteps.user_is_already_logged_in_as_admin()&amp#27;[0m &amp#27;[32mAnd &amp#27;[0m&amp#27;[32mUser navigates to the PIM module&amp#27;[0m &amp#27;[90m# com.casestudy.stepdefinitions.PIMSteps.user_navigates_to_the_pim_module()&amp#27;[0m &amp#27;[32mAnd &amp#27;[0m&amp#27;[32mUser is on the Employee List tab&amp#27;[0m &amp#27;[90m# com.casestudy.stepdefinitions.PIMSteps.user_is_on_the_employee_list_tab()&amp#27;[0m &amp#27;[32mWhen &amp#27;[0m&amp#27;[32mUser enters the employee name &amp#27;[0m&amp#27;[32m&amp#27;[1m"QA Automation"&amp#27;[0m&amp#27;[32m into the Employee Name search field&amp#27;[0m &amp#27;[90m# com.casestudy.stepdefinitions.PIMSteps.user_enters_the_employee_name_into_the_search_field(java.lang.String)&amp#27;[0m &amp#27;[32mAnd &amp#27;[0m&amp#27;[32mClicks on the Search button&amp#27;[0m &amp#27;[90m# com.casestudy.stepdefinitions.PIMSteps.clicks_on_the_search_button()&amp#27;[0m &amp#27;[32mThen &amp#27;[0m&amp#27;[32mThe employee list should be filtered correctly&amp#27;[0m &amp#27;[90m# com.casestudy.stepdefinitions.PIMSteps.the_employee_list_should_be_filtered_correctly()&amp#27;[0m &amp#27;[32mAnd &amp#27;[0m&amp#27;[32mAt least one record should be displayed in the results table&amp#27;[0m &amp#27;[90m# com.casestudy.stepdefinitions.PIMSteps.at_least_one_record_should_be_displayed_in_the_results_table()&amp#27;[0m &amp#27;[32mAnd &amp#27;[0m&amp#27;[32mThe &amp#27;[0m&amp#27;[32m&amp#27;[1m"First (& Middle) Name"&amp#27;[0m&amp#27;[32m column in the results should contain &amp#27;[0m&amp#27;[32m&amp#27;[1m"QA"&amp#27;[0m &amp#27;[90m# com.casestudy.stepdefinitions.PIMSteps.the_column_in_the_results_should_contain(java.lang.String,java.lang.String)&amp#27;[0m

testcase.name: runScenario["Unsuccessful login with invalid credentials", "US-01: Admin Login"](4)
testcase.system-out: @Web @Login @Negative Scenario Outline: Unsuccessful login with invalid credentials &amp#27;[90m# src/test/resources/features/web/Login.feature:22&amp#27;[0m &amp#27;[32mGiven &amp#27;[0m&amp#27;[32mUser is on the OrangeHRM login page&amp#27;[0m &amp#27;[90m# com.casestudy.stepdefinitions.LoginSteps.user_is_on_the_orange_hrm_login_page()&amp#27;[0m &amp#27;[32mWhen &amp#27;[0m&amp#27;[32mUser enters username &amp#27;[0m&amp#27;[32m&amp#27;[1m"Admin"&amp#27;[0m&amp#27;[32m and password &amp#27;[0m&amp#27;[32m&amp#27;[1m"wrong123"&amp#27;[0m &amp#27;[90m# com.casestudy.stepdefinitions.LoginSteps.user_enters_username_and_password(java.lang.String,java.lang.String)&amp#27;[0m &amp#27;[32mAnd &amp#27;[0m&amp#27;[32mClicks on the login button&amp#27;[0m &amp#27;[90m# com.casestudy.stepdefinitions.LoginSteps.clicks_on_the_login_button()&amp#27;[0m &amp#27;[32mThen &amp#27;[0m&amp#27;[32mUser should see an invalid credentials error message&amp#27;[0m &amp#27;[90m# com.casestudy.stepdefinitions.LoginSteps.user_should_see_an_invalid_credentials_error_message()&amp#27;[0m

testcase.name: runScenario["Successful logout and redirection to the login screen", "US-04: Logout"](8)
testcase.system-out: @Web @Logout @Positive Scenario: Successful logout and redirection to the login screen &amp#27;[90m# src/test/resources/features/web/Logout.feature:10&amp#27;[0m &amp#27;[32mGiven &amp#27;[0m&amp#27;[32mUser is already logged in as Admin&amp#27;[0m &amp#27;[90m# com.casestudy.stepdefinitions.LoginSteps.user_is_already_logged_in_as_admin()&amp#27;[0m &amp#27;[32mAnd &amp#27;[0m&amp#27;[32mUser is on the Dashboard page&amp#27;[0m &amp#27;[90m# com.casestudy.stepdefinitions.LoginSteps.user_is_on_the_dashboard_page()&amp#27;[0m &amp#27;[32mWhen &amp#27;[0m&amp#27;[32mUser clicks on the user profile dropdown menu&amp#27;[0m &amp#27;[90m# com.casestudy.stepdefinitions.LoginSteps.user_clicks_on_the_user_profile_dropdown_menu()&amp#27;[0m &amp#27;[32mAnd &amp#27;[0m&amp#27;[32mClicks on the Logout option&amp#27;[0m &amp#27;[90m# com.casestudy.stepdefinitions.LoginSteps.clicks_on_the_logout_option()&amp#27;[0m &amp#27;[32mThen &amp#27;[0m&amp#27;[32mUser should be navigated back to the login screen&amp#27;[0m &amp#27;[90m# com.casestudy.stepdefinitions.LoginSteps.user_should_be_navigated_back_to_the_login_screen()&amp#27;[0m
